title: oldenlandia mellii
intro: Oldenlandia mellii, also known as Asian swampweed or Mell's oldenlandia, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. It is a perennial herb that grows in wetlands and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Oldenlandia mellii include its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory infections, such as bronchitis and pneumonia. Oldenlandia mellii can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or decoction, and is often used in combination with other herbs in traditional medicine.
